examples: She wouldn't understand the hint but followed me to a sideboard, where she importuned me in a whisper to give her directly what I had brought.
I think this card might be good in a metagame deck's sideboard.
To grace a sideboard or an entrance hall.
International shipping can be arranged if that 1960s pencil-leg sideboard really catches your fancy.
Since there was an opened jar of Brazil nuts on the sideboard, Hadley offered these to Anton, too.
